    2024-25 Indiana Pacers Roster and Stats

    Previous Season
    Next Season

    Record: 50-32, Finished 4th in NBA Eastern Conference

    Coach: Rick Carlisle (50-32)

    Executive: Kevin Pritchard

    PTS/G: 117.4 (7th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 115.1 (17th of 30)

    SRS: 1.68 (13th of 30) Pace: 99.9 (7th of 30)

    Off Rtg: 116.5 (9th of 30) Def Rtg: 114.3 (13th of 30) Net Rtg: +2.2 (12th of 30)

    Expected W-L: 46-36 (12th of 30)

    Preseason Odds: Championship +6600, Over-Under 46.5

    Arena: Gainbridge Fieldhouse Attendance: 685,434 (26th of 30)

    NBA 2025 Playoffs:
    Won NBA Eastern Conference First Round (4-1) versus Milwaukee Bucks  (Series Stats)
    Won NBA Eastern Conference Semifinals (4-1) versus Cleveland Cavaliers  (Series Stats)
    Won NBA Eastern Conference Finals (4-2) versus New York Knicks  (Series Stats)
    Lost NBA Finals (3-4) versus Oklahoma City Thunder  (Series Stats)

    Effective Field Goal Pct

    Effective Field Goal Percentage
    This statistic adjusts for the fact that a 3-point field goal is worth one more point than a 2-point field goal.

    True Shooting Percentage
    A measure of shooting efficiency that takes into account 2-point field goals, 3-point field goals, and free throws.

    Player Efficiency Rating

    Player Efficiency Rating
    A measure of per-minute production standardized such that the league average is 15.

    Tyrese Haliburton 21.8 (14th)

    Win Shares

    Win Shares
    An estimate of the number of wins contributed by a player.

    Tyrese Haliburton 10.4 (6th)

    Offensive Win Shares

    Offensive Win Shares
    An estimate of the number of wins contributed by a player due to offense.

    Tyrese Haliburton 8.1 (3rd)

    Win Shares Per 48 Minutes

    Win Shares Per 48 Minutes
    An estimate of the number of wins contributed by a player per 48 minutes (league average is approximately .100)

    Tyrese Haliburton .204 (9th)

    Box Plus/Minus

    Box Plus/Minus
    A box score estimate of the points per 100 possessions a player contributed above a league-average player, translated to an average team.

    Tyrese Haliburton 5.8 (7th)

    Offensive Box Plus/Minus

    Offensive Box Plus/Minus
    A box score estimate of the offensive points per 100 possessions a player contributed above a league-average player, translated to an average team.

    Tyrese Haliburton 5.7 (5th)

    Value Over Replacement Player

    Value over Replacement Player
    A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

    Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

    Tyrese Haliburton 4.9 (4th)

    Offensive Rating

    Offensive Rating
    An estimate of points produced (players) or scored (teams) per 100 possessions

    Tyrese Haliburton 130.5 (10th)

    Assist Pct

    Assist Percentage
    An estimate of the percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while they were on the floor.

    Tyrese Haliburton 38.9 (6th)

    Block Pct

    Block Percentage
    An estimate of the percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked by the player while they were on the floor.

    Myles Turner 6.0 (3rd)

    Turnover Pct

    Turnover Percentage
    An estimate of turnovers committed per 100 plays.
